data.name: FunTimeCampAndRestQassimRoad
data.value: Fun Time Camp and Rest Qassim Road

data.name: FunTimeDharmaDescription
data.value: A distinctive break for happy times in green spaces, a horse stable, two sections for men and women with integrated facilities: - two Living rooms - fully equipped kitchen - external Arabic living room - outdoor games area - barbecue platform - fully equipped toilets - bedrooms.

data.name: FunTimeFunTimeCampAndRestQassimRoadDescription
data.value: The first modern camp that combines modernity and originality, modern indoor councils, outdoor camps, overnight tents Bedrooms with fully equipped facilities to serve our guests 24 hours in summer and winter.

data.name: FunTimesChaletsAboutUs
data.value: Fun Time is a group of chalets, rest houses and distinctive camps that have different spaces suitable for families and friends, and each chalet is characterized by complete privacy, a private swimming pool, an additional annex, green spaces and a private barbecue area.

data.name: FunTimesChaletsAlThumamaDescription
data.value: It is located in the Rimal district, before Owaidah roundabout - close to all services, markets and high-end restaurants on Al Thumama Road. Distinguished chalets with private pools and green spaces with indoor and outdoor seating, a dining hall with an American kitchen open to the hall, a bedroom and water courses, with an external extension to the garden with a private bathroom and a small kitchen. The number of 9 chalets, each chalet takes a modern design different from others, suitable for spending the most beautiful times.
